prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that enforce log retention policy: the log.retention.ms and log.retention.bytes validation, the LogManager retention check, and the segment deletion enforcement for both time-based and size-based retention.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Java source files in apache/kafka that enforce log retention policy: the log.retention.ms and log.retention.bytes validation, the LogManager retention check, and the segment deletion enforcement for both time-based and size-based retention.
